response.overview: The show that doesn't ask "What can we do to make you better?" It's the one that asks: How can we make you worse! The worst little slut that you can be, and then some! This is one nasty show that you won't find on TV, but you can see all of it right here! Enjoy the action.5 sexy women come see the Doc for some therapy.
response.title: Not The Dr. Phil Show
